153 P3D P3D_NR_BED_MOBILE 39d(P3d)Nursing Rehab: Bed Mobility CHAR 1 Indicates the extent to which the patient participated in activities to improve or maintain his self-performance in moving to and from a lying position, turning side to side, and positioning him or herself in bed.
